name: vln-lab-same-cu128
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'git config --global --get-all safe.directory | grep -Fxq /workspace/vln-lab || git config --global --add safe.directory /workspace/vln-lab; bash scripts/setup/setup_notebook_kernel.sh test-v1'
postAttachCommand: bash -lc 'git config --global --get-all safe.directory | grep -Fxq /workspace/vln-lab || git config --global --add safe.directory /workspace/vln-lab; bash scripts/setup/setup_notebook_kernel.sh test-v1'
